message:
feat(web): add queued builds display and update stats field names

Updates the builds page to show queued jobs and aligns with API changes:

1. Queued builds section:
   - Shows jobs waiting for workers with position indicator
   - Animated entry for visual feedback
   - Displays project, command, wait time, and queue position

2. API field alignment:
   - successful_builds → success_count
   - failed_builds → failure_count
   - Handles new queued_builds array in status response

3. Refresh interval reduced from 2s to 1s for more responsive updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
